task_completion.description: The BraTS MRI scan data is successfully loaded into 3D Slicer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface is visible with brain MRI images displayed in the Red (axial), Yellow (sagittal), and Green (coronal) slice views. The images show a brain structure.

task_completion.description: A fiducial point representing the tumor centroid is placed on the tumor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the slice views (particularly the Red/Axial view), a fiducial marker (dot, crosshair, or sphere, often labeled 'F' or '1') is visible located centrally within the tumor mass (the distinct abnormal region).

task_completion.description: Ruler or line measurements are used to measure the tumor dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Linear measurement lines (rulers) are visible spanning the tumor in the slice views. These lines indicate the agent is measuring the major, intermediate, or minor axes.

task_completion.description: The tumor centroid is saved to the specified .mrk.json file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog or file explorer window shows the file 'tumor_centroid.mrk.json' being saved or present in '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/'.

task_completion.description: The principal axis report JSON file is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer or text editor shows the file 'principal_axis_report.json' in the directory '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/'.

task_completion.description: The report contains the required calculated fields (volume, ratios, classification).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or preview window displays the content of the JSON report. It contains keys like 'ellipsoid_volume_ml', 'elongation_ratio', 'flatness_ratio', and 'shape_classification' with numerical values filled in.

integrity.description: The agent uses the 3D Slicer GUI tools for measurement rather than purely scripting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking on the Markups module toolbar (e.g., ruler icon, fiducial icon) and interacting with the slice views, rather than only typing code in the Python console.

integrity.description: The agent performs measurements before generating the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of measurement lines on the tumor appears in the timeline before the JSON report is written or saved.

integrity.description: The agent does not copy-paste values from an external source or the prompt description.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in the report are derived from the agent's own actions (e.g., the ruler values shown on screen match or approximate the values entered in the report).
